scenes.description: A blizzard-black mountain road split by fresh rockfall; Evelyn lies half-kneeling beside strapped medical crates, her right hand trapped under dark stone, red blood cutting through snow while helicopter light slices the storm above.
scenes.framing: High-angle vertical composition with Evelyn small in the lower third and rotor light pressing down from the top.
scenes.movement: Quick fade from black, then slow dolly in toward her trapped hand and face.
scenes.transition_in: Hard cut from black on narration hit.
scenes.transition_out: White snow-wash wipe into helicopter arrival.
scenes.overlay_notes: Phrase captions only: "saved another woman first" and "bleeding in the snow". No speech bubble in image.
scenes.shot_intent: Establish physical danger and immediate betrayal before any world explanation.
scenes.information_role: Viewer learns Evelyn is injured while protecting Pack supplies during the collapse.

character_actions.notes: Right hand visibly trapped and bandaged by blood but avoid gore.

scenes.description: Lucien in a black executive coat carries Seraphina toward the helicopter ladder; Evelyn remains behind in the snow, reaching with her free left hand as guards hesitate between them.
scenes.framing: Low-angle view from Evelyn position; Lucien and Seraphina dominate the upper frame, Evelyn foregrounded at bottom edge.
scenes.movement: Slow upward tilt from Evelyn hand to Lucien turning away.
scenes.transition_out: Rotor blur match cut to shelter lights.
scenes.overlay_notes: Speech bubble overlay from Lucien: "Take Seraphina first." Place near Lucien, not baked into image.
scenes.shot_intent: Make Lucien’s choice visual before the bubble confirms it.
scenes.information_role: Viewer understands the abandonment is public, deliberate, and not a misunderstanding.

action_sequence: face partly hidden by storm light
reach from snow with left hand

scenes.description: Temporary shelter station under harsh white lamps; warning tape cuts across the frame, keeping snow-soaked Evelyn outside while Seraphina sits under the black-and-gold Luna blanket against Lucien.
scenes.framing: Symmetrical medium-wide interior with warning tape as horizontal barrier and Evelyn isolated in the lower foreground.
scenes.movement: Subtle lateral tracking from Evelyn side of the tape to Seraphina under the blanket.
scenes.transition_in: Rotor blur into fluorescent shelter light.
scenes.transition_out: Lamp flicker cut to manor fireplace warmth.
scenes.overlay_notes: Phrase caption: "like the wife he had chosen". Optional small bubble from Seraphina is deferred to edit if caption space allows.
scenes.shot_intent: Convert physical abandonment into public identity replacement.
scenes.information_role: Viewer sees Seraphina occupying Evelyn’s Luna symbol while Evelyn is blocked outside.

scenes.description: Blackthorn Manor sitting room with tall fireplace and cold luxury; feverish Evelyn reaches toward Caspian with her left hand while the child hides behind Seraphina clutching a small wooden wolf charm.
scenes.framing: Medium shot triangle: Evelyn isolated left, Seraphina and Caspian locked together right, fireplace vertical behind them.
scenes.movement: Slow dolly out to reveal the distance between mother and child.
scenes.transition_in: Warm fireplace cut from shelter light.
scenes.transition_out: Match cut from charm to study door handle.
scenes.overlay_notes: Speech bubble overlay near Caspian: "You smell like medicine and blood." Keep bubble above lower caption zone.
scenes.shot_intent: Land the child rejection as a separate wound from Lucien’s betrayal.
scenes.information_role: Viewer learns Evelyn has been replaced inside the family, not only in public.

action_sequence: keep bandaged right hand close to body

character_actions.dialogue: You smell like medicine and blood.

scenes.description: Narrow corridor outside Lucien’s study; Evelyn braces against dark wall paneling, fever-pale, while a blade of warm light leaks from the almost-closed door.
scenes.framing: Close-up profile on Evelyn in shadow with door gap as bright vertical line behind her.
scenes.movement: Static held stare, slight digital push only in edit.
scenes.transition_out: Rack focus suggestion from Evelyn hand to study interior.
scenes.overlay_notes: Phrase caption: "one last excuse". No speech bubble yet.

scenes.description: Desk-lamp close-up: crooked left-hand writing on a severance request, bandaged right hand resting uselessly nearby, ink pooling at Evelyn’s signature beside a glass of water and pain pills.
scenes.framing: Insert shot from above, paper angle diagonal, hands and objects filling frame without readable text.
scenes.movement: Slow zoom in on the left hand and ink line.

scenes.information_role: Viewer understands Evelyn is initiating severance using her left hand.

scenes.description: The Luna ring and master suite key lie on top of the severance paper under a hard desk lamp; Evelyn’s half-packed trunk sits open in the background with plain clothes and her mother’s notes.

scenes.description: Lucien’s study fireplace in harsh orange light; severance paper slides from a silver tray into the fire as Lucien’s black-gloved hand gestures dismissively, his face cut by shadow.
scenes.framing: Medium close composition with fire in lower third, Lucien looming above, butler tray at edge.
scenes.movement: Dolly in from tray to flame as paper catches fire.
scenes.transition_in: Gold ring edge match cut to flame.
scenes.overlay_notes: Two speech bubbles, timed sequentially: "Burn it." then "Blackthorn Pack has no discarded Luna." Keep bubbles upper-middle away from flame captions.
scenes.shot_intent: Show Lucien refusing the severance as control, not heartbreak.
scenes.information_role: Viewer learns the peaceful legal/emotional exit is denied immediately.

action_sequence: look toward butler rather than letter
character_actions.dialogue: Burn it. Blackthorn Pack has no discarded Luna.

scenes.description: Doorway shadow behind the study: Evelyn remains dry-eyed and resolved, her face framed by darkness while fireplace light outlines her bandaged right hand and the burning room beyond.
scenes.framing: Vertical close-up with Evelyn centered in shadow, fireplace glow behind her forming a thin rim line around her face and bandaged hand.
scenes.movement: Very slow dolly in to her eyes, ending on frozen stare.
scenes.transition_out: Cut to black after final caption.
scenes.overlay_notes: Final phrase caption: "a way he cannot burn". No cliffhanger spoiler beyond this line.
scenes.shot_intent: Complete the arc with Evelyn’s decision, not with Lucien’s control.
scenes.information_role: Viewer understands the arc landing: she has not escaped yet, but her inner break is complete.

protected_future_arcs.protected: Seraphina invading the Pack medical center with stolen formula, destroying mother's manuscript, and Lucien locking Evelyn out of the lab.
Lucien freezing materials and budget, Seraphina destroying Evelyn's right-hand nerves with corrosive reagent, suppressed monitoring and testimony.
Fake re-signing of severance papers, birthday banquet public mother claim, Caspian forcing Lucien to divorce Evelyn.

bottom_card_protections: Evelyn's research strength may only be hinted.
External protection forces remain fully hidden.
Fake death and identity-switch route remain fully hidden.
Sterling family identity line remains fully hidden.
asset_generation_notes: Generated images must not contain subtitles, speech text, readable documents, logos, watermarks, or warning-tape text.
Use the provided character sheet for Evelyn, Lucien, and Seraphina continuity where supported by the chosen image workflow.
Caspian and minor staff can be generated from descriptions; do not introduce future-arc characters or Sterling/Adrian references.
Environmental audio only remains optional; no music source is planned.

decorative_visuals.reason: Most scenes have clear communicative purpose

summary.notes: User approved scene plan; quality checks were strong.
